title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - AC-3
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: AC-3 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control AC-3 in the Access Control family. The control title for AC-3 is Access Enforcement. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: AU-6 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, AU-6, belongs to the Audit and Accountability family and is titled Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
